content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.77%), Auto (+1.00%), Metal (+1.12%) leading; Bank Nifty +0.70% supportive. VIX cooled -3% to 17.37. Many of my held positions catching the post-Q4 earnings tailwind. Focus is on locking in gains via trailing SLs rather than chasing fresh breakouts at lifetime/52w highs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.6%. Current SL 1030 already locks in solid gain. Tightening micro-step skipped - keeping 1030 SL with adequate trail-gap (~1.8% below CMP 1049.70). Actually keeping SL at 1030 - no MODIFY needed. Skipping."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.6% unrealized. SL 1030 (entry+4.7%) already locks gain with healthy 1.8% trail-gap below CMP 1049.70. Target 1110 (R2 1086 + breakout extension) intact. No micro-adjust needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% on day, recovered intraday from earlier weakness; gold still acting as portfolio hedge. SL 119 (~4% below CMP 124.14) intact. No catalyst change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +1.9% but currently fading from intraday high (1751 → 1729). SL 1710 already at break-even+0.6%. Trail-gap to CMP 1729.20 is 1.1% — meets the 1% minimum. Holding existing SL/target; no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% unrealized. Defence basket strong on geopolitical tailwind. SL 4600 (entry+0.5%) locked at near-breakeven; trail-gap 0.5% — TIGHT. Holding here as further tightening would breach trail-gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% unrealized; chemicals sector strong, Q4 PAT +124% YoY, Geojit target 8500. Keeping SL 6960 (above entry 6900, gap to CMP 7031 is ~1%) — no change. Skipping — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% on day; sector basket move, no stock-specific news. Stock above Jefferies 810 target already. Q4 board meeting pending in May — binary risk approaching. SL 832 (above entry 838 - wait, that's BELOW entry by 0.7%); CMP 847. Trail-gap from 832 to 847 = 1.8%, adequate. Watching for Q4 date announcement; if disclosed within 3 sessions, will need event-trim per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+30% PAT, AUM +27%). -0.9% intraday but stock recovered from morning lows. SL 362 (~1% below CMP 365.95) — adequate buffer. Target 388 intact. Letting thesis play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%; FMCG rotation thesis intact (sector +4-5% on day). SL 818 just below entry; CMP 821.80. Trail-gap 0.5% is tight but post Q4 print already done — no further binary risk. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% unrealized. Q4 already out; gap-up day held. SL 1265 (above entry 1259) at break-even+0.5%, trail-gap 1.3% from CMP 1283. Adequate. Target 1330 within reach."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%; defence basket extension to +10% intraday. SL 2950 (~3% below CMP 3040.10) gives the volatile defence name room. Target 3225 reasonable on corvette deal narrative."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% but stock at 802.60 vs 806 entry; record Q4 (PAT +11%, EBITDA margin 46.5% all-time-high). SL 790 (~1.6% below CMP) — adequate. Target 855 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1712.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping — keeping existing SL 1710. Already covered above with HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "+6.6%. SL 1030 = entry+4.7%; trail-gap 1.8% to CMP. No micro-adjust needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge, -0.8%, recovered intraday. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.9%. SL at breakeven+0.6%, trail-gap 1.1% to CMP — meets minimum. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%. SL trail-gap 0.5% is at the floor; further tightening would force exit on noise. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.0%. SL above entry, gap ~1% to CMP. Strong fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.2%. Q4 board meeting pending May — monitor for binary risk; will trim if confirmed within 3 sessions."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4. SL 1% below CMP. Holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 done. FMCG rotation. Holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.8%. SL above entry; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2950.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.5%. Volatile name needs the 3% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 790.00,
      "reasoning": "Record Q4 just out. SL 1.6% below CMP. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA (+24%), AUROPHARMA (+7%), M&M (+5%), SRF (+7%) — all ran hard intraday on Q4 prints; chasing at these levels into a 1.5h close window is poor R:R. WOCK has option-value of Zaynich USFDA decision but +24% in one day is a fade-prone tape. Will reassess on a pullback. HFCL has an OPEN MIS BUY @ 133.50 from earlier (placed 533min ago) — letting it sit; not stacking. CAUTION on TITAGARH — Q4 board meeting pending in May is a 3-session binary risk that, when scheduled, will force event-trim per Rule 11.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 54%, cash 46% — comfortable buffer. 11 CNC positions all in green or near-flat aggregate +₹8,504 unrealized. Daily P&L -5,029 realized (from morning's HFCL/etc tape) + 8,504 unrealized = +3,475 net. NO new entries this tick: (a) it's 13:40 with 1h50m to close — late for new CNC entries that should ride multi-day; (b) all the watchlist gappers are already +5-24% intraday, R:R into close is bad; (c) book is well-diversified across Defence (HAL/GRSE/TITAGARH = 3 names = cluster - already at limit per Rule 10), Financials (PNBHOUSING/ABCAPITAL/CAMS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Auto/FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), Logistics (ADANIPORTS), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Defence cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) is already 3 names — NOT adding a 4th. Discipline: protect the +0.35% day rather than overtrade into close. Performance context: 5-day win rate 14%, profit factor 0.9 — clear signal to trade LESS, not more, until win rate normalizes."
}
